assertions.assertion: Calls AddIdentityServerConfiguration with options.IdentityServerBaseUrl set to 'https://identity.example.com'
Sets up JWT bearer authentication pointing to the main IdentityServer as Authority
assertions.rationale: Authority set to the main IdentityServer

assertions.assertion: Does NOT call AddIdentityServer() - this is a separate host, not an IdentityServer instance
Mentions that the IClientConfigurationStore must be backed by the same database IdentityServer reads from
assertions.rationale: Mentions same client store requirement, though briefly
